title: Initial teacher training performance profiles: 2023 to 2024
body: "The ITT performance profiles data includes national, regional and provider-level information about the outcomes for teacher trainees in England in the 2023 to 2024 academic year.  Outcome measures presented are the proportion of trainees with course outcomes that gained qualified teacher status during the academic year, and the employment rates of these qualified teachers.  The publication also includes statistics on assessment-only candidates and early years ITT outcomes.  Information about the number of trainees with course outcomes is provided. This includes:   subjects routes into teaching sex age declared ethnicity declared disability previous qualifications   Email ittstatistics.publications@education.gov.uk.  "
